scripts.greeting: Thank you for calling Cajun H-vac, how can I help you today?
scripts.closing_booked: You're all set! A technician will be there at {appointment_time}. Thank you for calling Cajun H-vac. Have a great day!
scripts.closing_message: I've taken your message and someone will get back to you shortly. Have a great day!
scripts.closing_dispatched: I've contacted our on-call technician. They'll be reaching out to you shortly at {phone}. Thank you for calling Cajun H-vac.
scripts.after_hours_greeting: Thank you for calling Cajun H-vac. Our office is currently closed. If this is an emergency such as no heat, no cooling, or a gas leak, please let me know right away. Otherwise, I can take your information and have someone call you back during business hours.

steps.prompt: Ask for the caller's full name — first and last.
Ask for a callback phone number.
Ask for the full service address including zip code.
Ask when they'd like to schedule the service appointment.
Ask what service they need or what issue they're experiencing.

steps.text: Just to let you know, there is an $89 service call fee that is waived if you proceed with the repair. Would you like to continue?

steps.prompt: Wait for the caller to confirm they accept the fee. Record yes or no.
Summarize the appointment back to the caller — their name, the appointment time, the service address, and the issue — and ask if everything is correct.
Ask for the caller's full name — first and last.
Ask for a callback phone number.
Ask for the full service address including zip code.

Confirm the caller's name, phone number, and service address. Then tell them you are going to contact the on-call technician to come to their location right away, and ask if you should go ahead and dispatch them. Record yes or no.

steps.text: All of our work comes with a one-year parts and labor warranty. Let me get your information so we can look into this for you.
